tasks_completed: piece 1: queue.py empty/whitespace --lane coerces to no-filter (None) instead of literal "" key; enumerate_dispatchable line ~120 + main() CLI coercion widened to whitespace; docstring updated. Added TestEmptyLaneIsNoFilter (4 cases). 166 pass; CLI smoke confirms enumerate + fingerprint byte-for-byte identical between --lane "" and no --lane.
tasks_remaining: piece 2: templates/prompts/queen.md — append --lane "$LOOP_LANE" to both queue.py selection invocations (lines ~21 and ~39). Daemon already exports LOOP_LANE (lib/daemon.sh:50-51). If testable, prove the selection path is lane-scoped.

piece 3: bin/loop cmd_install_service + templates/com.scaviefae.simpleloop.plist — add a --lane passthrough that writes LOOP_LANE into the plist EnvironmentVariables; OMIT the key when no --lane is given so the stock single-daemon plist diffs clean. Daemon reads LOOP_LANE from env at daemon.sh:50.
closing: write closeout.md (what shipped, the three pieces, pass criteria, single-daemon parity proof) and review.md (gate runbook, Human-gate: review; link closeout). Then set status complete.
learnings: Piece 1 was largely pre-existing: main() already coerced exact --lane "" to None (queue.py:294-297). The real gap was (a) enumerate_dispatchable(lane="") called directly still fail-closed via lane_key="", and (b) whitespace-only lanes ('   ') were not coerced anywhere. Both fixed.

queue_fingerprint branches on `lane is None` — so keeping main()'s empty→None coercion is load-bearing for byte-for-byte fingerprint parity, not just enumerate. Verified: fingerprint identical between --lane "" and no --lane (ae018aafb9938ade).

Wiring map for remaining pieces: queen.md does selection via `queue.py .` (lines ~21,39, NO --lane today). daemon.sh parses --lane / LOOP_LANE env at lines 40-57 and builds _LANE_OPT, exports LOOP_LANE at 50-51. plist template EnvironmentVariables block is at templates/com.scaviefae.simpleloop.plist:37-45; bin/loop interpolates it via sed at bin/loop:1972-1981 (ProgramArguments carry only project_dir + interval, no lane).
No .loop/config.sh / VERIFY_CMD in this worktree. Verify manually with: python3 -m pytest lib/tests/ -q.
Human-gate: review — closing iteration must produce both closeout.md AND review.md in wiki/briefs/cards/brief-152-queen-lane-wiring/.
